body: {"q": "dispatch", "hits": [{"f": "AGENTS.md", "l": 35, "txt": "ffs-engine  (dispatch, ranking, memory)", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "AGENTS.md", "l": 53, "txt": "| `ffs-engine` | Unified scanner, dispatch, ranking |", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 24, "txt": "ffs is fast at the *scan* but its `@` surface today is just `fuzzy_search()` called with `@`-prefixed query text. Refere", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 32, "txt": "- Does **not** read files, resolve payloads, dispatch agents, or own any UX \u2014 host app decides", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 573, "txt": "| LLM-mediated dispatch (rejected) | codebuff | `agents/base2/base2.ts:144` | https://github.com/CodebuffAI/codebuff/blo", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 634, "txt": "**No tests in Phase A for:** payload resolution, line range injection into reads, binary policy, image handling, agent/t", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 777, "txt": "- [ ] 1 HIGH-relevance pattern explicitly rejected: LLM-mediated dispatch (codebuff)", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 794, "txt": "| HIGH | codebuff | spawnable agents filter; 4-agent pipeline; image attachment orthogonal; rejected: LLM-mediated dispa", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 804, "txt": "- Typed structured dispatch (`FilePart` / `AgentPart` / `ImageContent`)", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 811, "txt": "- codebuff uses LLM-mediated dispatch; we reject (ffs is search, not agent runtime)", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "crates/ffs-c/src/engine_ffi.rs", "l": 6, "txt": "//! access to the symbol index, dispatch, and token-budgeted read APIs.", "target": "dispatch", "d": 1}, {"f": "crates/ffs-c/src/engine_ffi.rs", "l": 19, "txt
